title: Call Analysis
description: Structured output for an AI-analysed sales or discovery call from Fireflies.ai

pain_points.description: Specific problems or frustrations expressed by the prospect

current_solution.description: How the prospect currently handles the problem we solve

budget_signals.description: Any mentions of budget, spend, or financial context

timeline_signals.description: Any urgency, deadlines, or implementation timelines mentioned

objections.description: Explicit or implied pushbacks, concerns, or hesitations

key_quotes.description: High-signal verbatim quotes from the prospect worth capturing

next_steps.description: The agreed or implied next step at end of call

executive_summary.description: 2-3 sentence narrative: what happened on this call at high signal

strategic_assessment.description: What does this tell us about the prospect's readiness, fit, and risk?

recommended_approach.description: What should the rep do next and why?
